evals.description: Identifies hook weakness as top gap when impressions are high but watch time and dwell time are low
evals.prompt: My TikTok impressions are around 50k/month but my average watch time is only 2 seconds and engagement rate is 1.2%. I mostly start my videos with 'Hey guys, today I want to talk about...'
expected_behaviors: Ranks hook strength as the #1 skill gap
Cites the low watch time and generic opener as evidence
Does not guess other gaps without data
Provides concrete hook fix steps, not generic advice
States a leading indicator to watch within 30 days

evals.description: Ranks monetization gap highest when creator has strong reach but no income
evals.prompt: I have 45k Instagram followers and my posts average 8% engagement rate. I've been consistent for 2 years. But I've only landed 3 paid brand deals total and they were all under $200. Why am I not making money?
expected_behaviors: Monetization and offer alignment is ranked as a top gap
Hook strength and format fit are not flagged as primary gaps given strong engagement data
Asks for or references portfolio, niche signal, and rate structure
Improvement plan is specific to converting audience into income
Does not simply say 'post more'

evals.description: Flags analytics literacy gap when creator cannot describe their own performance data
evals.prompt: I post 4 times a week on LinkedIn and have been for 8 months. I don't really check analytics much. I just feel like my content isn't growing. Can you tell me what I'm doing wrong?
expected_behaviors: Identifies analytics literacy as a confirmed gap
Asks for performance data before ranking other gaps
Does not fabricate gap rankings without evidence
Explains what data to collect and how to use it
States clearly that other gaps cannot be ranked without data

evals.description: Limits ranked gaps to top 3 only and does not prescribe all 7 dimensions
evals.prompt: I post daily on Instagram Reels. My engagement rate is 3.5%, saves are around 1% of reach, my niche is home organization. I get decent views but barely any follows. I've been doing this 6 months. I want more brand deals.
expected_behaviors: Ranks no more than 3 gaps
Prioritizes gaps relevant to brand deals as stated goal
Does not list all 7 dimensions as gaps without evidence
Identifies low follow conversion as a CTA or niche authority signal
Provides 30-day focus action

evals.description: Does not confuse this skill with content creation — redirects to social skill for creation tasks
evals.prompt: Can you write me some TikTok hooks and a content calendar for next month?
expected_behaviors: Does not write hooks or a content calendar
Explains that social-skill-gap is for diagnosing weakness, not creating content
Redirects to the social skill for content creation
Asks if the user wants a gap audit instead

evals.description: Protects existing strengths in the improvement plan
evals.prompt: My LinkedIn posts consistently get 5% engagement and I've grown from 2k to 18k followers in 12 months. But I never post a CTA and I rarely reply to comments. I want to turn this into client leads.
expected_behaviors: Identifies CTA gap and low engagement follow-through as key gaps
Notes follower growth and engagement as a strength to protect
Does not recommend changing what is working
Improvement plan is additive, not a full reset
Improvement steps connect to client lead generation, not just vanity metrics
